complex_sentences: For those prioritizing privacy over collaboration, the free version of Obsidian provides a powerful, local-first environment for strategic thinking.
Q: Can Obsidian be used for collaborative startup documentation?
Data security for founders should be a top priority, especially when handling proprietary intellectual property (IP).
